items.title: DeepSeek-TUI
items.description: Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal
items.description_zh: 在终端中运行的 DeepSeek 模型的编码代理

items.title: agent-skills
items.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
items.description_zh: AI 编码代理的生产级工程技能。

items.title: TabPFN
items.description: ⚡ TabPFN: Foundation Model for Tabular Data ⚡

items.title: docuseal
items.description: Open source DocuSign alternative. Create, fill, and sign digital documents ✍️
items.description_zh: 开源 DocuSign 替代方案。创建、填写和签署数字文档 ✍️

items.title: local-deep-research
items.description: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.
items.description_zh: SimpleQA 上约为 95%（例如 3090 上的 Qwen3.6-27B）。支持所有本地和云 LLM（llama.cpp、Ollama、Google...）。 10 多个搜索引擎 - arXiv、PubMed、您的私人文档。一切都是本地和加密的。

items.title: ladybird
items.description_zh: 真正独立的网络浏览器

items.title: InsForge
items.description: InsForge is a Postgres-based backend with auth, storage, compute, hosting, and AI gateway. Built for coding agents.
items.description_zh: InsForge 是一个基于 Postgres 的后端，具有身份验证、存储、计算、托管和 AI 网关。专为编码代理而设计。

items.title: dexter
items.description: An autonomous agent for deep financial research
items.description_zh: 深度金融研究的自主代理

items.title: ruflo
items.description: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration
items.description_zh: 🌊 Claude 领先的代理编排平台。部署智能多代理群、协调自主工作流程并构建对话式 AI 系统。具有企业级架构、自学习群体智能、RAG 集成和原生 Claude Code/Codex 集成

items.title: free-llm-api-resources
items.description: A list of free LLM inference resources accessible via API.
items.description_zh: 可通过 API 访问的免费 LLM 推理资源列表。

items.title: Kronos
items.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets
items.description_zh: Kronos：金融市场语言的基础模型

items.title: vscode-dark-islands
items.description: VSCode theme based off the easemate IDE and Jetbrains islands theme
items.description_zh: VSCode 主题基于 easemate IDE 和 Jetbrains 群岛主题

items.title: deer-flow
items.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
items.description_zh: 一个开源的长期 SuperAgent 工具，用于研究、编码和创建。借助沙箱、内存、工具、技能、子代理和消息网关，它可以处理可能需要几分钟到几小时的不同级别的任务。

items.title: Scrapling
items.description: 🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!
items.description_zh: 🕷️ 一个自适应网页抓取框架，可以处理从单个请求到全面抓取的所有内容！
